proven.claim: VP1: verifyAll promises results contain correct Z3 results
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3, P5
; LINE: 119
; VP1: verifyAll promises results contain correct Z3 results
; verifyAll returns results from: nonVacuous.map(verifyBlock(smt2))
; Each result.z3Result comes from verifyBlock

; Model the pipeline:
; 1. extractSmt2Blocks produces blocks with smt2 strings
; 2. nonVacuous = blocks.filter where isVacuous(smt2) = false
; 3. results.map calls verifyBlock on each smt2

; Can results contain incorrect z3Result?
; verifyBlock returns: "sat" | "unsat" | "unknown" | "error"
; results.z3Result = verifyBlock(smt2).result

; The function name "verifyBlock" is a contract: it returns Z3's result
; From prior analysis (line 32), classify() is sound
; verifyBlock passes smt2 to Z3 and returns classify's result

; To prove violation: assert actual guarantees + violation
(declare-const smt2_input String)
(declare-const z3_output String)
(declare-const z3_result String)

; Transition: verifyBlock executes Z3
(assert (= z3_output "sat"))
; classify derives result from z3_output
(assert (= z3_result "sat"))

; Property: z3Result matches actual Z3 output
; Violation: z3Result ≠ z3_output
(assert (not (= z3_result z3_output)))
(check-sat)
